name: Smoked Prime Rib
recipeInstructions:
1. Place dry rub seasonings over the entire roast surface.
2. Grill the roast in a smoker (indirect heat) for 3 to 4 hours at 200 to 250 degrees Fahrenheit, or until a meat thermometer indicates 140 degrees Fahrenheit (for M-Rare).
3. Sprinkle crushed rosemary leaves three-quarters of the way through the cooking time.
